results.title: Strong Q2 '26 results with €255 million net profit, RoTCE 28.7% and CIR 31.0%; [IR News]
results.description: Further strengthening capital in preparation for planned acquisition of PTSB - Delivering strong Q2 '26 results: Net profit of €255 million, supported by continued revenue growth and ongoing synergy gains - Highly profitable business model: Q2 '26 RoTCE of 28.7% well above BAWAG's >20% through-the-cycle target - Excess capital: CET1 ratio of 17.4% with excess capital of €1.05 billion above 12.5% CET1 target - PTSB as strategic opportunity in Ireland: Capital build in first half of 2026 allows for fully self-funding of the transaction, which is subject to shareholder, High court, and regulatory approvals. PTSB shareholder scheme vote scheduled for July 30, 2026

Uzbekistan State Debt Reaches US$46.9 Billion
results.description: Uzbekistan's state debt reached US$46.9 billion or 31.9% of GDP as of 1 January 2026, according to the Fiscal Strategy for 2027–2029.

results.title: Vendors praise new Morgan County-Decatur Farmers Market, but train noise a drawback
results.description: More than a year after the Morgan County-Decatur Farmers Market moved into its new $3.25 million facility, vendors say the upgraded building has improved the shopping experience, even as some continue to cite train noise and lighter weekday traffic as...

results.title: Coalition pledges $350 million to finish stalled Wonthaggi Hospital
results.description: A Liberal and Nationals government would spend $350 million to finish the Wonthaggi Hospital redevelopment if it wins the November election.
